text:
Charts spinning on load across both browsers points to a backend issue on our end rather than your setup. Engineering is being looped in now.

In the meantime, try the web app if you haven't already — sometimes a fresh session clears it. If charts are still stuck there too, that confirms it's server-side and the team will prioritize it.

Let us know if it clears up on its own in the next few minutes, or if it's still frozen.

Novig Support
